summary: Mercury hardening (5 plan fixes + 1 hard-gate fix) implemented in prod modules, unit-tested, and verified end-to-end against prod code. Audit v6 produced a non-stub deliverable with real llm_trace metrics and zero fabricated rows.

forced_tool_step0.detail: task_requires_forced_first_tool() + tool_choice=required on audit step 0 behind INCEPTION_FORCE_AUDIT_TOOL (default 1) with one-shot fallback to auto on 400/unsupported.

evidence_state_injection.detail: build_evidence_state_block() injects <evidence_state> (read-so-far + STILL REQUIRED) as a trailing system block each non-synthesis audit turn.

critical_rules_last.detail: <critical_rules> anti-fabrication block appended after <self_check> at the very end of build_agent_system_messages.

fewshot_negatives.detail: Negative few-shot (invented req_2026 metrics without reading llm_trace) + positive read chain added to <tool_routing>.

reasoning_high_audit.detail: resolve_reasoning_effort(audit_task=True, tool_steps>0) -> INCEPTION_AGENT_AUDIT_REASONING_EFFORT (default high); audit_task wired from loop.

hard_evidence_gate.detail: ADDED beyond plan: mandatory_evidence_pending + deliverable_write_pending now block synthesis via a dedicated budget (INCEPTION_MAX_GATE_TURNS, default 6) independent of the soft-nudge budget. Root cause of v4/v5 skips: max_nudges=2 exhausted before all required reads. tool_choice stays auto here (forcing required made Mercury call the wrong tool).

audit_v6.method: direct call_agent against PROD modules, workspace=/home/opr/oprai_lab, writes land in lab (P-15 compliant)
audit_v6.tokens_reported: not measured (honest: lab trace rows lack token fields; anti-fabrication rule held)

blocker.detail: The :5004 /api/chat path with lab_target=True runs a subprocess in the lab cwd that imports /home/opr/oprai_lab/modules/* . The lab modules were a pre-v5 baseline, so prior lab_target HTTP audits (v4/v5/v6) ran stale code.
blocker.resolution: Promoted the Inception/Mercury subsystem prod->lab (targeted, with backup): inception_adapter.py, inception_agent_policy.py, inception_agent_tools.py, inception_skill_loader.py (new), inception_tool_helpers.py (new), inception_thread_compat.py (new), instance_paths.py. Backup at oprai_lab/modules/.backup_mercury_promote_20260623_162122. Identical files left untouched (llm_router, deliverable_validator, codebase_context, llm_trace, etc.). No bulk rsync.

verification_after_promotion.method: lab_target=True via POST /api/chat/async on :5004 (real HTTP path, lab subprocess imports promoted lab modules)
verification_after_promotion.metric_crosscheck: 6/6 sampled request_id/latency_ms rows match logs/llm_trace.jsonl exactly

service.note: Leftover nohup on 5004 killed; systemd owns the port.
